title: Enforce Pod Security Standards with Namespace Labels — Applying to a single namespace
text:
You can update a specific namespace as well. This command adds the
enforce=restricted
policy to
my-existing-namespace
, pinning the restricted policy version to v1.36.
kubectl label --overwrite ns my-existing-namespace
\
pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce
=
restricted
\
pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce-version
=
v1.36
